Document:
# Communications Reference
This section covers the radio systems used by ground forces.
## Guides
- [textlink="AN/PRC-117G Radio" link="AU14CommsANPRC"] - operating instructions for the manpack radio: net setup, operating modes, COMSEC fill, retransmission stations, interception, and the net log. - [textlink="Field Headsets" link="AU14CommsHeadsets"] - issued headsets: named nets, relay coverage, jamming, and direct-frequency tuning. - [textlink="Voice Procedure" link="AU14CommsVoiceProcedure"] - standard radio message format, prowords, and worked examples for contact reports, fire missions, and casualty evacuation requests. - [textlink="Comms Quick Reference" link="AU14CommsQuickRef"] - chat prefixes, signal ranges, antennas, operating modes, transmit power, squelch, and COMSEC controls.
## Find a Topic
[bold]Topic[/bold]
[bold]Guide[/bold]
Set up or operate an AN/PRC
[textlink="AN/PRC-117G Radio" link="AU14CommsANPRC"]
Use an issued headset
[textlink="Field Headsets" link="AU14CommsHeadsets"]
Learn radio calls and prowords
[textlink="Voice Procedure" link="AU14CommsVoiceProcedure"]
Check a control, range, or prefix
[textlink="Comms Quick Reference" link="AU14CommsQuickRef"]
